narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads D1+H4 CSM at 100 in a Risk-Off High regime driven by hawkish Fed repricing, the 10Y yield surging to 4.595%, and equity drawdown pushing safe-haven flows directly into dollar. USDCAD is the priority expression — D1+H4 Strong Buy with H4 1212 at 70 rising, CAD's H4 CSM accelerating to 55 versus D1 at 33 flags a short-term counter-bid in CAD that does not override the dominant USD buy; NZDUSD and USDCHF are secondary longs given NZDUSD's H4/D1 divergence collapse and USDCHF's 0.85 inverse correlation to EURUSD amplifying every USD leg.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, H4 1212 at 70 rising on both TFs simultaneously
Fading: EURUSD CMP 37 H4 at 13 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 36 H4 at 13 decelerating, NZDUSD CMP 43 H4 at 17 in sharp decline

WATCH
Silver breaking $76 triggers accelerated commodity-currency selling, pressing AUDUSD below current H4 sell signal confirmation
US 2Y yield breaking flat into a rise reprices USDJPY H4 Buy toward extension given current +4 signal
CAD H4 CSM holding above 55 into next session invalidates USDCAD long and shifts focus to CADJPY long on D1/H4 realignment

themes.theme: USD strength on hawkish Fed expectations and inflation concerns
Inflation shock from energy and geopolitical tensions
Asian FX weakness capped by dollar strength despite China optimism
Brazilian Real weakness pressuring commodity prices
Safe-haven flows into USD and rates as equities decline
Bond yields climbing on inflation and Fed hawkishness
Geopolitical risk premium from Iran tensions supporting commodities

key_observation: Dominant theme is USD strength driven by hawkish Fed repricing on inflation fears from energy shocks and geopolitical tensions. Risk-off sentiment evident with equity weakness and safe-haven flows. Asian currencies and commodity-linked currencies like BRL under pressure. Gold weakness despite inflation suggests rates move dominates risk premium.
watch: Fed communication cadence, Iran situation escalation, Chinese growth data, US inflation prints, equity market stabilization
